title: Partnership Executive
description:
Project Executive

Job Summary:

We are seeking a highly skilled and experienced Project Executive to execute strategic projects. The ideal candidate will have a strong background in managing large-scale programs and a proven track record of delivering successful outcomes.

Key Responsibilities:

  • Execute strategic projects from inception to completion.
  • Generate and analyze data analytic reports to inform decision-making.
  • Manage product development processes and ensure timely delivery.
  • Lead generation initiatives to drive business growth.
  • Conduct market research to identify trends and opportunities.
  • Develop and implement strategic plans for project development.

Preferred Background:

  • Proven experience in executing projects and managing large-scale programs.
  • Strong analytical skills with the ability to generate and interpret data reports.
  • Experience in product development and market research.
  • Excellent leadership and team management skills.
  • Strategic thinker with the ability to develop and implement effective plans.

Qualifications:

  • Bachelor's Degree in Business, Marketing or a related field is preferred.
  • Minimum 3 years of experience in project management or related roles.
  • Proficiency in project management software and tools.
  • Strong communication and interpersonal skills.
  • A positive and determined approach to researching and analyzing new business opportunities.

Why Join Us:

  • Be part of a leading training and development company with a global presence.
  • Work in a dynamic, collaborative, and supportive environment.
  • Opportunities for career development and growth.

Job Types: Full-time, Permanent

Benefits:

  • Health insurance

Schedule:

  • Monday to Friday

Supplemental Pay:

  • 13th month salary

Work Location: In person

postedCompany.description:
TRAINOCATE is one of the most trusted IT and human capability development training providers in Asia.  We are passionate about providing our customers with the most relevant industry-recognized certifications and courses that will propel them to the pinnacle of their careers.

With more than 20 years of experience under our belt, TRAINOCATE’s specialty is in the purveyance of vendor specific technologies and certifications, high-end IT solutions, customized and bespoke content as well as a robust portfolio of business and management skills delivered via a range of convenient modalities.

At TRAINOCATE, we are strong advocates of lifelong-learning as knowledge and skills gained ensures competitiveness and survivability in the dynamic workplace.  We thrive when our customers unlock their potential through learning goals and we strive to always thoroughly understand their needs and requirements to ensure an optimal learning experience.
postedCompany.name: TRAINOCATE (S) PTE. LTD.
